---
title: "Seltene Hieroglphen"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-seltene-hieroglphen">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



## A – Der Mann und seine Tätigkeiten

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## B – Die Frau und ihre Tätigkeiten

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## C – Gottheiten in Menschengestalt

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## D – Teile des menschlichen Körpers

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## E – Säugetiere

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## F – Teile von Säugetieren

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Gardiner-Nr. </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphe </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> F63 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/03_Hieroglyphen-selten/F63_xnty_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnty* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> vorn befindlich </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## G – Vögel

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## H – Teile von Vögeln

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## I – Amphibien und Reptilien

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## K – Fische und Teile von Fischen

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## L – Wirbellose und andere Tiere

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## M – Bäume und andere Pflanzen

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## N – Himmel, Erde und Wasser

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Gardiner-Nr. </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphe </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> N6B </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/03_Hieroglyphen-selten/N6B_nsw-bjt_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nsw-bit* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> König von Ober- und Unterägypten </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> N102 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/03_Hieroglyphen-selten/N102_jmn_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Amun </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## O – Gebäude und Teile von Gebäuden

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## P – Schiffe und Teile von Schiffen

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Q – Möbel

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## R – Tempel

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## S – Kronen

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## T – Krieg, Jagd und Schlachterei

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## U – Landwirtschaft und Handwerk

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## V – Seil, Faser, Korb usw.

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## W – Stein- und Tongefäße

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## X – Laibe und Kuchen

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Y – Schreiben, Spiele und Musik

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Z – Geometrische Figuren

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Aa – unklassifizierte Hieroglyphen

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
<tbody>
  <tr>

  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
